title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Gaurs Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Gaurs Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!
